name: Apple Baby Toy - Cloud Island™
description:
Add a cute and delightful piece to your little one's nursery with the Apple Plush Toy for Baby from Cloud Island™. This plush toy features a snail emerging from an apple with a green leaf, creating a charming appearance. Made of soft fabric, this baby toy looks great displayed on a shelf, windowsill or tabletop.

Cloud Island™: Designed with love. Made without compromise.
